channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Non-Confrontational Encounter: Trump and Xi Exchange Pleasantries at Lavish State Dinner
Senators Unanimously Approve Forgoing Their Salaries During Shutdowns
item.description: The Senate passed a resolution on Thursday to withhold lawmakers' pay during government shutdowns, aiming to make federal closures financially...

item.title: Prepare, America: Buc-ee's Expands to 6 New States This Year and Next
White House Summary of Trump-Xi Meeting Omits Taiwan; China Focuses on That Issue with Warning
item.description: The White House described the meeting in Beijing between President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping as "good."
